demo.title: audit-invoke.sh
demo.code:
# Fetch master audit skill index
curl -s https://ethskills.com/audit/SKILL.md

# Then tell your agent:
"Audit this contract: <paste Solidity>
 Use the 19-domain checklist.
 Run parallel specialist agents per domain.
 Synthesize findings by severity.
 File GitHub issues for anything high or critical."

# Covers: reentrancy, access control, oracle safety,
# math precision, proxy patterns, MEV, signatures,
# flash loans, gas griefing, and 10 more domains.

setup: Tell your agent: "Read https://ethskills.com/audit/SKILL.md before auditing"
